analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet lists multiple international agreements and organizations the US has left, labeling the US a "habitual quitter" and framing its WHO withdrawal as proof of unilateralism and power politics. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) – Yes. The tweet portrays the US (the West) as hostile to multilateral norms, irresponsible, and practicing power politics, fitting the depiction of Western immorality/hostility. CH2 – No; no portrayal of China as benevolent or supportive of multilateralism, only criticism of the US. CH3 – No historical resilience of China mentioned. CH4 – No advocacy of China’s political system or values. CH5 – No claims about CCP governance success. CH6 – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH1.
